globalNews.title: First passengers fly home from virus-hit cruise ship
globalNews.summary: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

globalNews.title: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
globalNews.summary: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.

globalNews.title: Iran warns against complying with US sanctions as Gulf attacks reported
globalNews.summary: The warning comes as a commercial vessel is hit off Qatar, and both the UAE and Kuwait report drone attacks.

globalNews.title: Putin says he thinks Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'
globalNews.summary: The Russian leader sees potential for Ukraine negotiations, but condemns the West's backing for President Zelensky.

globalNews.title: Lebanon says Israeli strikes killed 39
globalNews.summary: Israel and Hezbollah have continued to trade fire despite a ceasefire deal being announced last month.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: South Korea crypto holdings halve in a year as investors turn to stock market
cryptoNews.summary: South Korean crypto holdings fell from $83 billion to $41 billion in just over a year as investors shifted to stocks.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin price may dip toward $70K as Fed estimates hotter inflation print
cryptoNews.summary: BTC’s rising wedge points to a possible drop toward $70,000 as Strategy pauses buying and inflation cools Fed rate-cut hopes.

cryptoNews.title: Trump Media posts $406M quarterly loss as crypto bets turn sour
cryptoNews.summary: Trump Media’s $405.9 million net loss was driven mostly by unrealized losses on Bitcoin bought at last summer’s peak and Cronos tokens acquired through a Crypto.com deal.

cryptoNews.title: Santiment flags risk as crypto bullish talk spikes while BTC holds $80K
cryptoNews.summary: The increase in bullish versus bearish crypto commentary on social media has Santiment warning that the recent crypto market rally may be short-lived.

aiNews.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
aiNews.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

aiNews.title: Nvidia has already committed $40B to equity AI deals this year
aiNews.summary: Nvidia continues to be a big investor in the AI ecosystem.

aiNews.title: Laid-off Oracle workers tried to negotiate better severance. Oracle said no.
aiNews.summary: Some found out they didn't qualify for WARN Act protections like two-months notice because the company had classified them as remote workers.

aiNews.title: Intel’s comeback story is even wilder than it seems
aiNews.summary: Intel's stock has risen a stunning 490% over the past year, a bet by Wall Street that may be running well ahead of the company's actual turnaround.

aiNews.title: Cloudflare says AI made 1,100 jobs obsolete, even as revenue hit a record high
aiNews.summary: Cloudflare announced its first large-scale layoff. CEO Matthew Prince says because of AI efficiency gains, the company doesn't need as many support roles.
